title: Yaniv
summary:
Yaniv (Hebrew: יָניב) is a Hebrew male name meaning "he will prosper". It may also refer to:

Yaniv (card game), an Israeli card game with no established rules
text:
Yaniv (Hebrew: יָניב) is a Hebrew male name meaning "he will prosper". It may also refer to:

Places
Yaniv (village), south of Pripyat, Kyiv Oblast, Ukraine
